---
title: "Matthew Curtis"



description: |
 
 
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{css}
d-title {
    display: none;
  }
  
```
::: {}
### Publications
**Twins Support the Absence of Parity-Dependent Fertility Control in Pretransition Populations**
with [Gregory Clark](http://faculty.econ.ucdavis.edu/faculty/gclark/) and [Neil Cummins](http://neilcummins.com/). 
Demography (2020). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s13524-020-00898-0).

**The Expansion of Public Education in Puerto Rico after 1900** with [Mateo Uribe-Castro](https://uribecastro.wordpress.com), 2023. Chapter in "Roots of Underdevelopment: A New Economic (and Political) History of Latin America and the Caribbean," edited by Felipe Valencia-Caicedo. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-38723-4_19). [Draft PDF](curtis-uribecastro-pr-edu-draft.pdf).

**Three New Occupational Status Indices for England and Wales, 1800--1939**
with [Gregory Clark](http://faculty.econ.ucdavis.edu/faculty/gclark/) and [Neil Cummins](http://neilcummins.com/), 2024. Historical Methods. 57, 1, p. 41-66. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/01615440.2024.2368458).  [Data avaliable.](http://mjdcurtis.com/links). 

**How did the European Marriage Pattern Persist? Social versus Familial Inheritance: England and Quebec, 1650--1850**
with [Gregory Clark](http://faculty.econ.ucdavis.edu/faculty/gclark/) and [Neil Cummins](http://neilcummins.com/), 2024.  Economics and Human Biology. 54, 10 p., 101383. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ehb.2024.101383).

**Was There a Crisis? A Human Development Index for Lower Canada, 1760 to 1848** with [Vincent Geloso](https://vincentgeloso.com), 2024. European Review of Economic History. [DOI]( https://doi.org/10.1093/ereh/heae016).  [Draft PDF](./pdfs/curtis-geloso-crisis-draft.pdf). [Draft Appendix PDF](./pdfs/curtis-geloso-crisis-appendix-draft.pdf).

**The Her in Inheritance: How Marriage Matching Has Always Mattered, Quebec 1800–1970**. 2025. Accepted at Journal of Economic History. [PDF](./pdfs/jmp-matt-curtis.pdf) . [IDEAS RePEc](https://ideas.repec.org/p/eca/wpaper/2013-351619.html). 


### Submitted papers

**Seeds of Knowledge: Premodern Scholarship, Academic Fields, and European Growth**
with [David de la Croix](https://perso.uclouvain.be/david.delacroix/). CEPR discussion paper DP18321, [Draft PDF](./pdfs/knowledge-growth.pdf). [CEPR link](https://cepr.org/publications/dp18321).

**The Mismeasure of Man: Why Intergenerational Occupational Mobility is Much Lower than Conventionally Measured, England, 1800--2021**
with [Gregory Clark](http://faculty.econ.ucdavis.edu/faculty/gclark/) and [Neil Cummins](http://neilcummins.com/). CEPR discussion paper DP17346. [Draft PDF](./pdfs/ccc-mobility-draft.pdf). [CEPR link](https://cepr.org/publications/dp17346).




### Works in progress
***Inheritance Customs, the European Marriage Pattern, and Female Empowerment*** with [Paula Gobbi](https://sites.google.com/site/gobbipaula/), [Marc Goñi](https://sites.google.com/site/marcgonitrafach/), and [Joanne Haddad](https://sites.google.com/view/joannehaddad/). 
[Draft PDF](./pdfs/cggh-draft.pdf).  Funded by ERC Starting Grant 947654, IDED, granted to Paula Gobbi.

**Before the Fall: Child Quantity and Quality in Pre-Demographic Transition Quebec**


### Other work

I wrote[.ado files](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1y12GQm-fjpBJbbMS6dDPGB2s9B7VkrLw/view) for the ABE record linkage algorithm with [Katherine Eriksson](http://kaeriksson.ucdavis.edu/).

I manage the [Global Price and Income History Group website](https://gpih.ucdavis.edu/) with Peter Lindert.

I wrote the [Data Appendix](https://data.nber.org/data-appendix/c13427/appendix.pdf)  for **Labor Market Polarization Over the Business Cycle** with Christopher Foote and Rich Ryan in 2014.
:::
